title: False Kisses
writer: Wallace Clifton, Winifred Reeve, Wilbur Daniel Steele
actors: Miss DuPont, Pat O'Malley, Lloyd Whitlock
plot: Fishing partners Paul Whalen and Jim Payne are rivals for the affections of Jennie Blake, a schoolteacher from the city who came to their small town of Rocky Point to teach school. After Jim is beaten in a fight by Paul, Jennie ma...
